{{Quote|Two Hapan battle groups have arrived from Iceberg Three to reinforce Mon Calamari home defense forces.|A communication officer, to [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Traest Kre'fey]]|<ref name="TUF" />}}
The '''Calamari Defense Force''' was established to defend [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]] following the [[Calamarian Revolt|liberation of Mon Calamari]].<ref name="DES" /> It later fought the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] again during the [[Battle of Calamari]],<ref name="DE" /> and the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] at the [[Defense of Mon Calamari (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Defense of Mon Calamari]].<ref name="TUF" />

{{Military-stub}}
